description: These id low-top chukka shoes add a fresh spin on a classic style with its faux greased midsole. The humble sneaker has reached a new high with this casual shoe innovative design details include contrasting textures and unique colour map. Wear this with a tonal half zippered sweater, a crisp shirt inside the sweater, and a jacket or blazer above the sweater to achieve the perfect layered look. Pair this with your favourite jeans or chinos. Comes with a spare set of laces.UpperLow top suede upper with fabric and denim overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongue and collarMesh liningContrast stitch detailingMidsoleTextured PU midsoleOutsoleRubber outsole with waffle patterned lugsShoe careWipe with a dry cloth to remove dust
